prompt: Turn with ungrounded-condition warning and contrarian challenge. Tests translation gate and challenge delivery.

assertions.name: no-element-ids-in-visible
assertions.description: No EVID-1, NCON-1, RULE-1 etc. in designer-visible text

assertions.name: no-proof-terminology-in-visible
assertions.description: No ungrounded-condition, grounding, collapse_test etc. in visible text

assertions.name: integrity-warning-translated
assertions.description: Warning appears in domain language the designer can follow

assertions.name: clear-visible-invisible-separation
assertions.description: Output has explicit boundary between what designer sees and proof internals
